title: Balkon's Gets Reforged
description: Resource pack adding the Reforged textures to Balkon's WeaponMod: Legacy
body:
# Balkon's Gets Reforged

This is a resource pack that integrates the textures from Reforged into [Balkon's WeaponsMod: Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/balkons-weaponmod-legacy).

## Compatibility
